UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a comprehensive user health profile within the Lens Bite application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the user profile, matches Firebase Auth UID.

healthReport.description: A structured JSON string containing allergens, medical history, body metrics (height, weight, BMI), medicines, and cooking practices.

definition.description: Stores detailed user profile information including comprehensive health metrics.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

firestore.reasoning: A unified UserProfile document stores the rich health data required for personalized AI analysis, following the requested IA diagram.
